name: Pfeffernusse (Pepper Balls)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and spices.
2. Heat honey and butter until the butter melts.
3. Cool mixture to lukewarm and beat in eggs.
4. Add the flour mixture.
5. Chill dough for 30 minutes.
6. Shape dough into 1-inch balls and place on a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
8. Cool cookies on wire racks.
9. Mix confectioners' sugar, vanilla, and water to form a thin glaze.
10. Dip cooled cookies in glaze and place on wire racks to dry.
11. Store cookies in airtight tins.
Makes 4 dozen cookies.
